subject: Verify MIN_PERIODS=30 and 37-39 period claim for danskvand/energidrikke/RTD
description: Read thesis/data/_03_engineered_dvhexclhd/regeneration_report.md — it already lists Periods per category (CSD 42, danskvand 37, energidrikke 39, RTD 37). Cross-check these period counts against the raw calendar span in the underlying facts data (via build_feature_matrix.py's calendar construction, or by checking the min/max period_year+period_month directly in the raw parquet) to confirm the 37-39 figure is a genuine data ceiling and not an artifact of a bug or truncated fetch. Confirm MIN_PERIODS=30 is actually the threshold used in build_feature_matrix.py (grep for MIN_PERIODS or equivalent constant) and that it is consistent across all 4 categories, not silently different per category. Write findings to plans/P0027_2026-07-10_15-30_csd-eda-reconciliation/findings.md under a new '## Phase 1 Verification' section, append-only.
